title: Marketplace Manager - Livspace - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Livspace - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Livspace. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Livspace:
Livspace is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Livspace!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
